headline: The Future of Brand Growth: Kantar Unites Global Visionaries to Honor the Year's Most Valuable Brands
summary: Marketing and advertising leaders from across the globe recently gathered for Kantar's third annual Brand Gala, an exclusive evening dedicated to honoring the world's most valuable and impactful brands. Kantar, the world's leading marketing data and analytics business, hosted the gala to celebrate the launch of the 2026 BrandZ Top 100 Most Valuable Global Brands. headline: The Coca-Cola Company Announces Participation in dbAccess Global Consumer Conference 2026
summary: ATLANTA, May 19, 2026--The Coca-Cola Company announced today that John Murphy, President and Chief Financial Officer, will present at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference June 4 at 11 a.m. CEST/5 a.m. ET.
